title: Add Varlock to a project
description: Adds a .env.schema, installs varlock, registers a `validate` target and updates .gitignore.

project.description: The project to set up varlock for. Defaults to the workspace root when omitted.
project.x-prompt: Which project should varlock be added to?

skipTarget.description: Do not register a `validate` target on the project.

skipPackageJson.description: Do not add varlock to devDependencies.
